content:
Hurry, Pune-Based NGOs! This Opportunity Is Calling You!

Ready to Explore the Power of AI for Social Impact?

Learn how AI can help your organisation communicate better, create smarter content, strengthen impact storytelling, and improve everyday productivity.

Join the AI for Impact: AI Capacity Building Workshop Series by EY GDS & CSRBOX®, exclusively designed for Pune-based Nonprofits!

✨ Understand Generative AI & Responsible AI
✨ Master Effective Prompting Techniques
✨ Create Smarter Presentations with AI
✨ Strengthen Storytelling for Donors & Stakeholders
✨ Learn AI Ethics, Bias, Fairness & Data Privacy
✨ Gain Hands-on Experience Through Practical Sessions

Workshop Schedule:

Phase I: AI Foundations & Responsible AI
🗓️ 10th July 2026
💻 Virtual | 2 Hours

Phase II: AI-Powered Presentations
🗓️ 17th July 2026
💻 Virtual | 2 Hours

Phase III: AI for Storytelling & Impact for Donors
🗓️ 30th July 2026
📍 In-Person at EY Global Delivery Services (EY GDS), Pune | 6 Hours

🔗 Registration Link: https://lnkd.in/gYsf4XKj

Akriti Mishra Jyothi Rajaprakash Sangeetha D Shyamali Roy Dipansh Chhabda Kanika Ghildiyal Yashaswini Sundar
comment: Most NGOs will find the gap isn’t prompting but integrating AI into messy donor reporting workflows and keeping data consistent enough for reliable outputs.
